channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The yearly NBN price hike is imminent — here's how much more you can expect to pay
item.description: We're a couple of months away from NBN Co making wholesale pricing adjustments — now's the time to start rethinking your NBN plan at home.

item.title: Twitch has new penalties for streamers caught viewbotting, CEO says
item.description: Repeat offenders will be punished with "caps" on their views.

item.title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
item.description: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, May 8 (game #1565)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, May 8 (game #1062)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, May 8 (game #796)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: The RAM crisis isn't alone anymore, PC users — a new report suggests there is now a motherboard manufacturer crisis, and it seems it's only going to get worse
item.description: The AI boom and its impact aren't letting up, as the trouble it has caused for RAM kits is now affecting motherboard manufacturers.

item.title: iam8bit recorded a jazzy Persona album for the series' 30th
item.description: The vinyl drops in Q4, but the full album is streamable now.

item.title: The Paranormal Activity game project is dead
item.description: The solo developer couldn't get an extension from rights-holder Paramount.

item.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
item.description: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

item.title: Bumble will replace swiping right with... something
item.description: The company previously announced it was working on an AI assistant that can make matches.

item.title: Are you the office Chicken Little?
item.description: If the disappearing office snacks have you updating your LinkedIn, you might be the office Chicken Little. Psychologists call it intolerance of uncertainty, and your brain is literally hijacking your rational thought. Here’s how to stop the spiral before you stress out your whole team. If the disappearing office snacks have you updating your LinkedIn, you might be the office Chicken Little. Psychologists call it intolerance of uncertainty, and your brain is literally hijacking your rational thought. Here’s how to stop the spiral before you stress out your whole team. ...

item.title: OpenAI debuts a Codex plugin for Chrome
item.description: The new feature could turn Codex into more than a coding aid.
